#466 Bolt fix: per-site eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/purity is acceptable; do NOT introduce a file-level or project-level disable of react-hooks/purity.

#467 Bolt fix: per-site eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/set-state-in-effect is acceptable; do NOT introduce a file-level or project-level disable — each site must carry its own single-line justification comment.

#469 Bolt fix: argsIgnorePattern/varsIgnorePattern for ^_ prefix is a RULE CONFIGURATION extension (documented TS-ESLint convention), NOT a rule disable. Scope must be strict: only affects @typescript-eslint/no-unused-vars, only adds the two pattern options, only ^_ prefix. Do NOT blanket-disable the rule. Do NOT add per-file overrides.

Lint 0w/0e MILESTONE (C4829 first clean state, preserved through 41b7c43 = 8 consecutive commits): every Bolt commit going forward MUST verify `npm run lint` returns 0 warnings 0 errors before claiming done. Regressing this milestone is a hard fail — fix-forward in same commit, do not ship.
